case_title: LEONARD BORENSTEIN VS. ALEXANDRA MAGILL et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO EXCLUDE APPEARANCES [CCP 116.540] (FOR COURT DATE:MAR-04-2010 AT 3:30PM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORENSTEIN, LEONARD
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE IS "GRANTED", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.

RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO PLTFF.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORENSTEIN, LEONARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF APPEARS BY TELEPHONE. DEFENDANTS ARE PRESENT IN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR BY TELEPHONE. DENIAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO A RENEWED APPLICATION. SUPPORTED BY SHOWING GOOD CAUSE. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-
